description_long: This is a classical-style marble bust depicting a robed human figure, likely female, with a head covering or turban. The sculpture features finely detailed facial features, with a serene expression and downcast eyes. The drapery of the garment is intricately carved, showing deep folds and realistic texture. The bust is mounted on a round pedestal base, which is also sculpted from the same material. The back of the sculpture is less detailed, focusing on the smooth contours of the head covering and shoulders. The overall appearance suggests a work inspired by Greco-Roman portraiture, often found in public spaces or museums.
description: A finely detailed marble bust of a robed, head-covered human figure on a round pedestal, with classical Greco-Roman styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed facial features, draped garment, and head covering.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the layered folds of the robe, and the rounded back of the head covering.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, less detailed back of the head and shoulders, with the pedestal base visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the drapery, and the curvature of the bust and base.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the background is plain and does not indicate an installation context.
